title: [FIRRTL] InstanceChoice support for LowerToHW, Part 2(ABI lowering)
body:
Implement generation of instance choice include files according to the FIRRTL
ABI specification. For each public module and option case combination, emit a
`.svh` header file (`targets_<PublicModule>_<Option>_<Case>.svh`) containing
macro definitions that map instance choice macros to hardware instances.

Add `InstanceChoiceMacroTable` to track option case macros. Instance choices
use nested ifdef blocks to select modules based on defined macros. The lowering
walks the instance graph from each public module to collect reachable instance
choices and emits one include file per (option, case) pair.

~~Currently stacked on https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9760~~
~~Integration tests should pass when IMDCE and Inliner fixes were merged.~~
